title: Thugging's Mc
description: Fresh world gen with underrated mods, tuned shaders, and smooth distant loading. with fresh new wild structure and dimensions to explore while revamping vanilla features provide a new fresh take on Minecraft
body:
This pack gives Minecraft a fresh feel with world generation powered by some underrated mods. You’ll come across new structures, explore a brand-new dimension with revamped vanilla features like a remastered day-night cycle with a similar system to terria. The shaders have been carefully tuned and modified not the easiest to run, but they’re set up to look great while still aiming for smoother performance than the default settings.


**RECCOMENDED TO HAVE ATLEAST 13GIGS OF RAM ALLOCATED TO THE INSTANCE, THIS MAY VARY DEPENDING ON YOUR DISTANT HORIZONS SETTINGS**
